4473 uint8_t seq1;
4474 uint8_t seq2;
4475 uint8_t server_encryption_multiple;
4476 uint8_t client_encryption_multiple;
4477 int32_t player_id;
4478 int32_t challenge_response;
4479 } ok;
4480 struct {
4481 InitBanType ban_type;
4482 union {
4483 struct {
4484 uint8_t minutes_remaining;
4485 } _0;
4486 struct {
4487 uint8_t minutes_remaining;
4488 } temporary;
4489 } *ban_type_data;
4490 } banned;
4491 struct {
4492 MapFile map_file;
4493 } warp_map;
4494 struct {
4495 MapFile map_file;
4496 } file_emf;
4497 struct {
4498 PubFile pub_file;
4499 } file_eif;
4500 struct {
4501 PubFile pub_file;
4502 } file_enf;
4503 struct {
4504 PubFile pub_file;
4505 } file_esf;
4506 struct {
4507 PubFile pub_file;
4508 } file_ecf;
4509 struct {
4510 MapFile map_file;
4511 } map_mutation;
4512 struct {
4513 PlayersList players_list;
4514 } players_list;
4515 struct {
4516 PlayersListFriends players_list;
4517 } players_list_friends;
4518 } *reply_code_data;
4519} InitInitServerPacket;
4520

4742 WelcomeCode welcome_code;
4743 union {
4744 struct {
4745 int32_t session_id;
4746 int32_t character_id;
4747 int32_t map_id;
4748 int32_t map_rid[2];
4749 int32_t map_file_size;
4750 int32_t eif_rid[2];
4751 int32_t eif_length;
4752 int32_t enf_rid[2];
4753 int32_t enf_length;
4754 int32_t esf_rid[2];
4755 int32_t esf_length;
4756 int32_t ecf_rid[2];
4757 int32_t ecf_length;
4758 char * name;
4759 char * title;
4760 char * guild_name;
4761 char * guild_rank_name;
4762 int32_t class_id;
4763 char * guild_tag;
4764 AdminLevel admin;
4765 int32_t level;
4766 int32_t experience;
4767 int32_t usage;
4768 CharacterStatsWelcome stats;
4769 EquipmentWelcome equipment;
4770 int32_t guild_rank;
4771 ServerSettings settings;
4772 LoginMessageCode login_message_code;
4773 } select_character;
4774 struct {
4775 char * news[9];
4776 Weight weight;
4777 size_t items_length;
4778 Item *items;
4779 size_t spells_length;
4780 Spell *spells;
4781 NearbyInfo nearby;
4782 } enter_game;
4783 } *welcome_code_data;
4784} WelcomeReplyServerPacket;
